calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a TWO Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
The Court ordered Case #543197 to be consolidated with this action in open court.
Petitioners: Shaoqin Li and Yao Peiliu, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Crystal Li, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Nelson Mok.
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Crystal Liu.
Decree signed in open court.
